aliases_zh: 天行者卢克|原力幽灵|Jedi Master
faction_zh: 义军同盟|新绝地武士团
bio_zh: 卢克·天行者是反叛军英雄，在恩多战役中击败达斯·维达后成为传奇绝地大师。他训练了蕾伊·天行者，将原力的传承延续到最后。
bio_en: Luke Skywalker was a Rebel hero who became a legendary Jedi Master after defeating Darth Vader at the Battle of Endor. He trained Rey Skywalker
movie_linkage: passing on the Force until the very end.

faction_zh: 独立星系联邦|义军同盟
bio_zh: 阿索卡·塔诺曾是阿纳金·天行者的学徒，在克隆战争中立下赫赫战功。战争结束后她离开绝地武士团，最终成为义军反抗帝国的关键人物。
bio_en: Ahsoka Tano was once Anakin Skywalker's Padawan
movie_linkage: earning great renown during the Clone Wars. After the war
movie_linkage_label: she left the Jedi Order and ultimately became a key figure in the Rebel Alliance's fight against the Empire.

aliases_en: The Hand of the Emperor|Lady Skywalker
bio_zh: 玛拉·杰德曾是帝国皇帝的秘密刺客，擅长徒手格斗。在皇帝死后她成为新共和国的飞行员，与卢克·天行者结为连理。
bio_en: Mara Jade was once the Emperor's secret assassin
movie_linkage: skilled in hand-to-hand combat. After the Emperor's death
movie_linkage_label: she became a pilot in the New Republic and married Luke Skywalker.

bio_zh: 瑞文是银河系最著名的绝地大师之一，曾在曼达洛战争中拯救共和国，后堕入黑暗面成为西斯尊主，创造了新的银河秩序。
bio_en: Revan was one of the most famous Jedi Masters in the galaxy
movie_linkage: saving the Republic in the Mandalorian Wars before falling to the dark side and becoming a Sith Lord

bio_zh: 阿芙拉博士是一位疯狂的天才考古学家和工程师，曾为达斯·维达工作。她周旋于各方势力之间，以犯罪为生。
bio_en: Doctor Aphra is a mad genius archaeologist and engineer who once worked for Darth Vader. She navigates between various forces and makes a living through crime.
movie_linkage: film_ep3

bio_zh: 魁刚·金是经验丰富的绝地大师，他发现了阿纳金·天行者的原力天赋。他在纳布星战役中牺牲，但他的理念影响了后世众多绝地。
bio_en: Qui-Gon Jinn was an experienced Jedi Master who discovered Anakin Skywalker's Force sensitivity. He sacrificed himself in the Battle of Naboo
movie_linkage: but his philosophy influenced many future Jedi.

aliases_zh: 欧比旺|绝地武士|本杰明
bio_zh: 欧比旺·克诺比是阿纳金·天行者的师父，在克隆战争中成长为卓越的绝地武士。克隆战争后，他在塔图因隐居，守护天行者家族的秘密。
bio_en: Obi-Wan Kenobi was Anakin Skywalker's mentor
movie_linkage: growing into a distinguished Jedi Knight during the Clone Wars. After the war
movie_linkage_label: he went into exile on Tatooine

aliases_en: The Chosen One|Darth Vader|Dark Lord of the Sith
bio_zh: 阿纳金·天行者是最强的原力敏感者，曾是拯救银河系的英雄。最终堕入黑暗面成为达斯·维达，在儿子卢克的感召下回归光明。
bio_en: Anakin Skywalker was the strongest Force sensitive
movie_linkage: once a hero who would save the galaxy. He ultimately fell to the dark side becoming Darth Vader
movie_linkage_label: and was redeemed by his son Luke.

name_zh: 帕尔帕廷/达斯·西迪厄斯
bio_zh: 帕尔帕廷是银河帝国的最高统治者，表面是议长，实际是西斯尊主。他操纵克隆战争，最终建立独裁统治，却在恩多陨落。
bio_en: Palpatine was the supreme ruler of the Galactic Empire
movie_linkage: 表面上是一個议长，实际是西斯尊主。他 was the mastermind behind the Clone Wars
movie_linkage_label: ultimately establishing dictatorial rule before falling at Endor.

bio_zh: 帕德梅·阿米达拉是纳布星的女王和天才外交家，也是阿纳金·天行者的爱人。她一生致力于银河系的和平，却因悲伤过度而离世。
bio_en: Padme Amidala was queen of Naboo and a gifted diplomat
movie_linkage: as well as Anakin Skywalker's love interest. She devoted her life to peace in the galaxy but died of a broken heart.

bio_zh: 尤达是绝地武士团最德高望重的大师，活了九百多年。他在达戈巴训练了卢克·天行者，将绝地智慧传承下去。
bio_en: Yoda was the most respected Jedi Master
movie_linkage: living over 900 years. He trained Luke Skywalker on Dagobah
movie_linkage_label: passing down Jedi wisdom through generations.

bio_zh: 梅斯·温杜是绝地武士团最激进的成员，使用激进的 Vaapad 原力形式。他在绝地武士团中地位崇高，最终死于达斯·西迪厄斯的阴谋。
bio_en: Mace Windu was the most radical member of the Jedi Order
movie_linkage: using the aggressive Vaapad Form of the Force. He held a prestigious position in the Order and ultimately fell to Darth Sidious' schemes.

faction_en: 汉·索罗是银河系最著名的走私者，驾驶千年隼号。他与丘伊的友谊跨越一生，在义军反抗帝国的事业中找到了人生意义。
bio_zh: Han Solo was the galaxy's most famous smuggler
bio_en: piloting the Millennium Falcon. His friendship with Chewbacca spanned a lifetime
movie_linkage: and he found purpose in the Rebel fight against the Empire.

aliases_zh: 莱娅公主|天行者|组织者
bio_zh: 莱娅·天行者是卢克的双胞胎妹妹，也是义军和抵抗组织的杰出领袖。她是阿纳金·天行者的女儿，一生致力于反抗独裁统治。
bio_en: Leia Skywalker was Luke's twin sister and an outstanding leader of the Rebel Alliance and Resistance. Daughter of Anakin Skywalker
movie_linkage: she devoted her life to fighting tyranny.

faction_en: 达斯·维达曾是绝地武士阿纳金·天行者，堕入黑暗面后成为银河帝国最令人恐惧的战士。但在儿子的感召下，他最终回归光明，摧毁了皇帝。
bio_zh: Darth Vader was once the Jedi Knight Anakin Skywalker
bio_en: falling to the dark side to become the galaxy's most feared warrior. But redeemed by his son
movie_linkage: he destroyed the Emperor.

bio_zh: 丘伊是来自卡希克的伍基人战士，与汉·索罗结下一生的友谊。他是卓越的工程师和飞行员，在义军反抗银河帝国的战争中发挥重要作用。
bio_en: Chewbacca was a Wookiee warrior from Kashyyyk who formed a lifelong bond with Han Solo. A skilled engineer and pilot
movie_linkage: he played a vital role in the Rebel's fight against the Galactic Empire.

faction_en: 琴·厄索是一名拾荒者和士兵，她的父亲被帝国强迫参与死星计划。在义军支持下，她成功偷取死星设计图，成为银河系的英雄。
bio_zh: Jyn Erso was a scavenger and soldier whose father was forced by the Empire to work on the Death Star. With Resistance support
bio_en: she successfully stole the Death Star plans
movie_linkage: becoming a hero of the galaxy.

faction_en: K-2SO是一台被重新编程的帝国礼仪机器人，后来成为义军重要的情报和战斗力量。它幽默而忠诚，在侠盗一号行动中牺牲。
bio_zh: K-2SO was an Imperial protocol droid reprogrammed to serve the Rebellion
bio_en: becoming a vital intelligence and combat asset. Witty and loyal
movie_linkage: it sacrificed itself during the Rogue One mission.

faction_en: 巴兹·马布斯是出身贫寒的独立枪手，与侠盗一号成员琴·厄索和卡西安·安道尔结伴。他火力凶猛，是团队中的重型武器专家。
bio_zh: Baze Malbus was a heavily armed mercenary from humble origins who teamed up with Rogue One members Jyn Erso and Cassian Andor. He was a heavy weapons expert for the team.
bio_en: film_rogue_one
movie_linkage: 侠盗一号

faction_en: 卡西安·安道尔是一名情报官员和义军领袖，沉着冷静，技艺精湛。他参与了侠盗一号行动，成功偷取死星设计图。
bio_zh: Cassian Andor was an intelligence officer and Rebel leader
bio_en: calm and skilled. He participated in the Rogue One mission and helped steal the Death Star plans.
movie_linkage: film_rogue_one

faction_en: 博迪·罗克是帝国飞行员，负责将死星设计图从帝国带出并传递给义军。他的勇气在侠盗一号行动中发挥了关键作用。
bio_zh: Bodhi Rook was an Imperial pilot responsible for carrying the Death Star schematics from the Empire and delivering them to the Rebellion. His courage was crucial in the Rogue One mission.
bio_en: film_rogue_one
movie_linkage: 侠盗一号

aliases_zh: 帕尔帕廷|议长|西斯皇帝
bio_zh: 帝国皇帝是西斯尊主达斯·西迪厄斯的真实身份，通过操纵克隆战争和建立银河帝国统治整个星系。他的最终计划是利用死星摧毁义军。
bio_en: The Emperor was the true identity of Sith Lord Darth Sidious
movie_linkage: ruling the entire galaxy through manipulation of the Clone Wars and establishment of the Galactic Empire. His endgame was using the Death Star to destroy the Rebellion.

bio_zh: 蕾伊是一名拾荒者，在贾库星独自生活了多年。她拥有强大的原力天赋，在找到卢克·天行者后开始学习绝地之道，最终成为新一代绝地大师。
bio_en: Rey was a scavenger who lived alone on Jakku for years. Possessing strong Force sensitivity
movie_linkage: she began learning the Jedi way after finding Luke Skywalker and ultimately became the next Jedi Master.

bio_zh: 芬恩是第一军团的暴风兵，编号FN-2199。在目睹第一军团的暴行后，他毅然叛逃，加入抵抗组织对抗第一军团。
bio_en: Finn was a First Order Stormtrooper
movie_linkage: designated FN-2199. After witnessing the First Order's atrocities
movie_linkage_label: he defected and joined the Resistance to fight against them.

bio_zh: 凯洛·伦是第一军团领袖，汉·索罗与莱娅·天行者的儿子。他崇拜外公达斯·维达，渴望成为银河系最强大的原力使用者。最终在蕾伊的帮助下回归光明。
bio_en: Kylo Ren was the leader of the First Order
movie_linkage: son of Han Solo and Leia Skywalker. He worshipped his grandfather Darth Vader and desired to become the most powerful Force user in the galaxy. He ultimately redeemed with Rey's help.

bio_zh: BB-8是一台勇敢的球形机器人，属于抵抗组织。它携带了洛·凯能斯失踪多年的地图，这份地图对于找到卢克·天行者至关重要。
bio_en: BB-8 was a brave spherical droid belonging to the Resistance. It carried a map to Luke Skywalker that Lor San Tekka had hidden for years
movie_linkage: which proved crucial for finding the Jedi Master.

bio_zh: 坡·达梅隆是抵抗组织最优秀的飞行员，驾驶X翼战斗机对抗第一军团。他勇敢无畏，在关键战役中发挥了重要作用。
bio_en: Poe Dameron was the Resistance's finest pilot
movie_linkage: flying X-wing fighters against the First Order. Brave and fearless
movie_linkage_label: he played a vital role in key battles.
